case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. JABIR MOHAMMED

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOHAMMED, JABIR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
